data.raceComments: {"comment":"Wide open finish. 13. HARMONY has upside and that appeals. She ran well enough first up at Geelong in a 0-66  over 1300m when midfield with improvement to come. She'll get over a bit further again but strips fitter and can hold a spot from the inside gate. 10. EASY DUN wasn't beaten far fresh at Bendigo over this trip when in the market and should come on from that. He'll be running on late. 11. GEFFINA struggles to win but is racing consistently in these sorts of races and has claims. 5. PRESTIGE OLE resumes. He didn't measure up to better company last time in but Mott booked from a good draw suits and he's right up to these if right. 6. GOVERNOR KING resumes over a suitable trip and has to be respected, plenty of other hopes.","runners":[13,10,11,5,6],"exclusive":false}
